title: Crafter's Companion - 5" x 5" Kraft Card & Envelopes- Pack of 100 - Includes 50 Kraft Card Blanks & 50 Matching Envelopes - Great for a Variety of Occasions
features: Pack includes 50 pre-scored kraft card blanks and 50 matching envelopes
5" x 5" size - the prefect blank canvas for cardmaking
Design and customise cards for any occasion
description: Product Description Make your own customised cards for family and friends with Crafter’s Companion 5” x 5” Kraft Card & Envelopes. This pack includes 50 cards and 50 matching envelopes, all in natural Kraft brown - perfect for rustic themes. Each card is pre-scored and blank, ready for your die-cut, stamped, embossed or 3D designs and decorations! Natural tones - The Crafter’s Companion 5” x 5” Kraft Card & Envelopes pack includes 50 pre-scored card blanks and 50 envelopes. Kraft brown card creates a rustic and natural effect, the perfect base for country-themed cards and event stationery. Craft personalised - Each card measures 5” x 5” - ready to be transformed into a card for so many occasions. From dies and stamps to decorations, embellishments and sweet messages, take a look at our range of papercraft products to find what you need to make a beautiful birthday, Christmas, wedding or any-occasion card. Premium quality - The card blanks are 250gsm and the matching envelopes are 100gsm - so whatever your cardmaking project, you can be sure of a professional finish! Ready to send - The pack includes 50 5” x 5” Kraft brown envelopes. So, you can craft, write and post your cards to family and friends with ease. Safety Warning Suitable for Ages 14+
